title: Large Video to Transcript output
description: Start with Transcript results for clickable MP3, transcript, and ZIP links. Run summary and Generated artifacts provide the underlying storage records for API users.

results.title: Transcript results
results.description: Primary table: status, quality, duration, word count, speaker count, and signed MP3/transcript/ZIP links for each media file.

summary.title: Run summary
summary.description: JSON summary with total successful and failed media files.

artifacts.title: Generated artifacts
artifacts.description: Underlying key-value store records for MP3, TXT, JSON, SRT, VTT, quality report, and ZIP outputs.
